name: Survey on credit terms and conditions in euro-denominated securities financing
description_short: Quarterly survey of large euro area banks on terms and conditions in securities financing transactions and OTC derivatives markets, covering haircuts, margins, collateral, and pricing.
use_cases: Are haircuts in the repo market tightening or loosening?
How are credit terms changing for hedge fund securities financing?
What collateral types are most commonly accepted in euro-denominated repo?
How are OTC derivative margin requirements evolving?
